category: glass wall decor / printed glass art / tempered glass print
style: high-resolution UV print on tempered glass, glossy and crystal-clear finish, modern home and office decor, photographic / abstract / figurative / landscape compositions, mounted on wood backing with hanging hardware
targetAudience: global homeowners decorating living rooms, bedrooms, entryways, hallways; office and co-working space decorators; interior design clients; housewarming, wedding and anniversary gift buyers; cafes, restaurants and boutique hotels seeking statement decor
designPromptExtra: Design must be a high-resolution photographic or fine-art image suitable for UV printing on tempered glass. Vivid saturated colors, sharp detail, balanced composition for indoor home or office wall display. No text overlay unless reference dictates. No metal silhouette, no flat single-color cutouts, no fabric textures, no visible frame. Output should be print-ready full-color image, aspect ratio matching the reference (default 2:3 portrait or 3:2 landscape), clean edges suitable for glass panel printing.
descriptionVoice: warm, modern, design-forward; emphasize tempered-glass quality, crystal-clear UV print durability, scratch and fade resistance, included hanging hardware, easy mounting, indoor home and office suitability, gift-worthy presentation; never reference apparel, fabric, metal art, canvas, or visible frames
